title: Farcr's Re-Create
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/Fjt0gpZ.png)

## About
A Very Small resource pack that changes plenty of things from the Create mod, into some redesigns I personally preferred. Renders the mod a little more sober and less flashy, for an experience that fits more with my tastes (and hopefully yours too!) 
Just a personal redesign pack, not supposed to be better or worse than base Create, so to each their own!  - suggestions and bug reports are always welcome!

## Support
